title: eleocharis quinqueflora subsp. meridionalis
intro: Eleocharis quinqueflora subsp. meridionalis, also known as the southern spike-rush, is a subspecies of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Eleocharis quinqueflora subsp. meridionalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
